note: Store each edge once, on the source record. Build derives the inverse for rendering.

relation_types.note: Event is a member of a named narrative thread. Carries thread_id, not target_id.
Earlier event creates the conditions for the target event.
Derived inverse of enables. Do not store manually.
This event is a documented response to the target event.
Derived inverse of responds_to. Do not store manually.
Events share a primary actor in the same role.
Events concern the same piece of legislation or statutory instrument.
Events are connected by a documented financial transaction or budget line.
This event record replaces or updates the target.
Derived inverse of supersedes. Do not store manually.

Two sourced events in documented tension. Carries target_id, a 'discrepancy' qualifier (see meta/discrepancy-types.json), and factual framing. Renders as a 'Discrepancy' connection. No verdict language.

Event attributes responsibility/outcome to an external party; the clarification documents actual jurisdiction and funding. Carries explainer_ref (educational) and optional target_id (a counter-event). Framing stays factual; the explainer educates.
